user_goal: 在 B006 Global ETF Momentum 回测 MVP 基础上做 backtest quality hardening：扩展多次月度调仓 fixture、配置化缺失 T+1 Open 处理、补充 clean/warning 风险场景、强化 metrics/equity curve/report 不变量，并保持 no-live/no-secret/no-network/no-broker/no-AI safety guards。
generator_handoff: Generator completed B007 F001-F005. F001 added multi-rebalance fixture/workflow coverage with rebalance_count and rebalance_trace. F002 added explicit missing_t_plus_1_open_policy with default flag_and_fallback_to_signal_close plus skip_trade and fail_closed tests, and reports expose configured policy and missing-price flags. F003 added clean/warning risk scenarios and expected/unexpected warning classification. F004 added equity_curve, turnover, monthly/yearly returns, annualized volatility, Sharpe, CAGR, max drawdown, and report traceability. F005 strengthened workflow E2E and safety guard regressions for no .env/API key/network/broker/paper/live/AI authority, T close signal, T+1 open default execution, nonzero metrics, and deterministic reports. Full local checks pass: .venv/bin/python -m pytest (37 passed), .venv/bin/python -m ruff check ., .venv/bin/python -m compileall trade tests, and .venv/bin/python -m mypy --install-types --non-interactive trade. Evaluator should run F006 independent L1 verification and produce signoff.

session_notes.generator: 2026-05-12: B007 F001-F005 completed and status moved to verifying for F006. Full local checks pass: pytest 37 passed, ruff, compileall, mypy.
